body: DONE: SignalService trait + SignalServiceImpl created. cargo check -p cairn-runtime passed. Files: (1) signals.rs — trait with ingest/get/list_by_project methods, (2) services/signal_impl.rs — SignalServiceImpl<S> backed by Arc<S> where S: EventLog + SignalReadModel, ingest appends SignalIngested event then reads back via projection, (3) registered in lib.rs (pub mod signals, pub use SignalService, pub use SignalServiceImpl) and services/mod.rs (pub mod signal_impl, pub use SignalServiceImpl).
